class.name: FestivalClock
class.brief_description: The single-day time system with irreversible phases.
class.description: A run always moves Morning to Afternoon to Night to Ended and never backwards. Content tied to a phase is lost once it passes. Phase progression is driven by the game raising milestones and then calling [method advance_phase], echoing Majora's Mask style hidden schedule beats. Registered as the [code]FestivalClock[/code] singleton.

signal.name: run_ended
signal.description: Emitted when the clock advances into the Ended phase.

signal.name: milestone_reached
signal.description: Emitted the first time a milestone id is triggered this run.

constants.constant: Festival setup, lighter tone, weather is determined.
Escalation, secrets emerge, social complexity increases.
